license: Official public ranking page; factual data only

rawFiles.name: Arab Ranking for Universities 2025 official results page
rawFiles.notes: Reviewed the public results table on the official Arab Ranking for Universities website.

transforms: Registered the official AARU 2025 results page as an approved source for factual ranking snapshots only.
Filtered the public results table to rows where Country is Syria.
Matched each imported row to an existing canonical university ID.
Created one regional overall Arab rank snapshot and one national Syria country-rank snapshot for each matched university.
Matched the source row named Tishreen University to the canonical sy-latakia-university record and retained that mapping note in the imported ranking rows.
reviewNotes: Imported only explicit ranks from the official AARU 2025 results table. The source publishes six Syria rows: Damascus University, International University for Science and Technology, Al-Andalus University for Medical Sciences, Tishreen University, Yarmouk Private University, and Al-Sham Private University.
